feedback_files.tests/test_feedback.py:
import json

from gateway_runtime import GatewayRuntime
from settings_store import SettingsStore


def write_config(path, payload):
    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload), encoding="utf-8")


def test_reload_rebinds_endpoint_policy_to_new_prefix(tmp_path):
    path = tmp_path / "gateway.json"
    write_config(path, {"api_prefix": "/blue"})
    runtime = GatewayRuntime(SettingsStore(path))
    assert runtime.endpoint_for("jobs") == "/blue/jobs"

    write_config(path, {"api_prefix": "/green"})
    runtime.reload()

    assert runtime.endpoint_for("jobs") == "/green/jobs"


def test_multiple_reloads_do_not_leave_the_first_route_active(tmp_path):
    path = tmp_path / "gateway.json"
    write_config(path, {"api_prefix": "/one"})
    runtime = GatewayRuntime(SettingsStore(path))

    write_config(path, {"api_prefix": "/two"})
    runtime.reload()
    write_config(path, {"api_prefix": "/three"})
    runtime.reload()

    assert runtime.endpoint_for("status") == "/three/status"
